title: Flamingo - Software update for just headset
scenario: Selective DFU for headset only completes successfully when both headset and charge case firmware updates are available on the Software Update tab
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate to the Home screen.
2. Locate your connected device and tap the Update button on the device card.
3. Verify the Software Update tab displays an "Update All" button, as well as separate "Update" buttons for the headset and the charge case.
4. Tap the "Update" button next to the headset (not the charge case).
5. Follow the on-screen prompts to complete the DFU (Device Firmware Update) process for the headset only.
expected: The DFU process completes successfully for the headset only. After the update, only the headset is on the latest firmware version; the charge case firmware remains unchanged.
